calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Atty. Deborah D. Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: State bar of California.
The following exhibits were identified and moved into evidence:
Exh. 1- Application for Reimbursement
Exh. 2- Notice of intention to pay

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: MURRY STURNER as follows:
Damages/Principal $50,000
Prejudgment Interest $11,456 for a total judgment of $61,456.00.
Judgment signed in open court.

Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-29-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Continued To Nov-14-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2006 Continued To Sep-12-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-20-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Text Ruling

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Murry Sturner, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is herd this day. Defendant in Propria Persona is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the trial date. Proceedings reported by: Ann Mendoza, CSR#6812. (212)
